text: As I take these tilted steps into this vibrant, structured space, buffeted by the repeated chant of 'Cessna-C,' I feel a curious blend of anticipation and detachment. The sterile architecture and controlled lighting contrast with the bold, playful colors of the 'R+D' exhibit. Here, research and creation are lauded, yet there’s an undercurrent of performative innovation; it is as if the walls are inviting me not just to observe, but to question the very machinery of progress itself. I sense the weight and wonder of inquiry—both exhilarating and slightly disorienting, as if I am a component in some larger experimental equation.
